# Example corpus format for `recon fingerprints test <slug>`.
#
# This file demonstrates the expected format only. The domains below are
# numbered sentinels under the reserved `.invalid` namespace. They cannot
# produce public DNS or CT matches. To exercise a fingerprint against live
# data, keep the corpus in the documented gitignored private workspace.
#
# Format: one apex per line. Blank lines and `# ...` comments are
# ignored. See CONTRIBUTING.md ("No evaluated-target data") for why the
# project does not ship a real-target corpus.

scenario-001.invalid
scenario-002.invalid
scenario-003.invalid
scenario-004.invalid
scenario-005.invalid
scenario-006.invalid
